channel.title: Organization Admin on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Organization Admin on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: github: More control over your GitHub-hosted runners
item.description:
GitHub Actions org admins can now control access to GitHub-hosted runners more tightly. They can disable standard hosted-runner labels like ubuntu-latest and add custom labels for finer-grained usage control.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Copilot organization custom instructions are generally available
item.description:
GitHub Copilot organization custom instructions are now generally available. Copilot Business and Copilot Enterprise org admins can set default instructions for their organization.

  • Source: GitHub
